questions.template: Two forces act on an object. Force A is {fa} N pointing east, and Force B is {fb} N pointing north. What is the magnitude of the resultant force?
A boat travels {a} km east, then {b} km north. What is the magnitude of its displacement?
Two perpendicular forces of {f1} N and {f2} N act on a particle. What angle does the resultant make with the {f1} N force?
A vector has magnitude {m} and makes an angle of {theta} degrees with the x-axis. What is the x-component?
